headline: Is Textron Expanding Its Presence in the Helicopter Market?

headline: Textron to Release Second Quarter Results on July 28, 2026
summary: PROVIDENCE, R.I., July 01, 2026--Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) will release its second quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday morning, July 28, 2026.
